metadata.name: File conflict handling workspace operation (valid)
metadata.description: Conformance fixture: a file conflict detected during sync, requiring an explicit resolution decision (DecisionCard). Silent resolution is not permitted. Emits file.conflict.evidence.

steps.name: detect-file-conflict
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops file-availability check --operation-id op-004 --file-ref projects/myproject/data/results.csv

steps.name: record-conflict-decision-card
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops decision-card record --operation-id op-004 --question 'Resolve conflict in results.csv' --answer 'keep-local' --decided-by user:alice --rationale 'Local version is more recent and manually verified'

steps.name: emit-file-conflict-evidence
steps.run: sourceosctl workspace-ops evidence emit --operation-id op-004 --kind file.conflict.evidence --file-ref projects/myproject/data/results.csv
